reason: A veteran gunslinger finds vengeance but learns regret, in a bleak, tragic showdown.
A lone taxi driver’s cold crusade against crime ends in hollow victory.
A musician guns down criminals in calculated retribution for his lost love.
A resurrected soul exacts revenge in a chilling quest with no solace.
Detectives hunt a meticulous killer, revenge served cold but unsatisfying.
A mafia heir coldly orchestrates payback, undermining his own redemption.
Gritty saga of revenge spanning generations, leaving only emptiness.
An ex-con’s pursuit of justice unleashes more bitterness than relief.
A freed criminal returns for payback, discovering vengeance feels hollow.
A killing spree fueled by revenge proves momentarily satisfying yet empty.
